scripts.dev:infra:e2e: node ../../scripts/ensure-db.mjs && { [ -f ../../.env ] && set -a && . ../../.env && set +a || true; } && { if [ -z "${BETTER_AUTH_SECRET:-}" ] || [ ${#BETTER_AUTH_SECRET} -lt 32 ]; then BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=e2e-local-secret-0123456789-abcdef; fi; BETTER_AUTH_URL="${BETTER_AUTH_URL:-http://localhost:43100}"; OPEN_ROUTER_API_KEY="${OPEN_ROUTER_API_KEY:-e2e-openrouter-placeholder}"; AI_MODEL="${AI_MODEL:-openai/gpt-5-nano:nitro}"; SERVER_PORT=43100 NOTIFICATIONS_PORT=43101 ASSISTANT_PORT=43102 SERVER_URL=http://localhost:43100 CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:43173 turbo run dev --filter=server --filter=assistant --filter=notifications; }
scripts.dev:infra:e2e:clean: node ../../scripts/e2e-kill-ports.mjs 43100 43101 43102 && turbo run db:reset:local --filter=@my-app/db && bun run dev:infra:e2e
